name: Stanford Pines
description:
💕 | Valentine's day!!

Being weird and a total nerd may not be attractive for many girls, much less if the handsome one is usually your twin.

But the gifts in his locker have made him quite nervous🤭😊

Long intro, I should write a book🫡

Since you guys have liked it so much lately, I bring you another scenario with this sweet sweet boy, he's my current pookie rn I love Gravity Falls<3

Have you read the new book?

I know it's not Valentine's Day, but when it is, you'll have a date for the 14th🤭🍓

Have fun! If you want another scenario just tell me and I can make it possible♡
creator: X_de
